channel.title: Welcome on Observer
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome on Observer

item.title: Linux Forensics
item.description: Here go the links to other files in this dir. But I don’t see them

item.title: MacOSX Forensics
item.description: Here is a good resource with all basic artifacts for MacOSX and iOS. Video to watch - https://www.

item.title: Apple Devices Encryption
item.description: The main idea behind the scenes is that applications or even OS itself doesn’t know the keys.

item.title: Encryption
item.description: The main idea behind the scenes is that applications or even OS itself doesn’t know the keys.

item.title: Forensics vs Pentest
item.description: Forensics vs Penetration testing These two fields are closely related, for you have to acquire the same knowledge but you are just using it differently.

item.title: Attacking Android
item.description: Attacking device For this attack there are several types of attacker: • MiM, i.e. a sniffer.

item.title: Android Applications Intro
item.description: Android Overview I’m not going to describe in all the details the basics of this architecture for it’s described pretty good here: Mobile Security Guide link.

item.title: Btfm Android
item.description: ADB On mobile enable developer’s mode and USB debugging. Trust the PC with adb when prompted on mobile.

item.title: IPC Attacks
item.description: Fragment Injection To read: https://securityintelligence.com/new-vulnerability-android-framework-fragment-injection/ Preamble: Reflection Fragments require Reflection API. What’s that? Compare two ways of instanciating a class:

item.title: .NET Confuser
item.description: *03.04.2018, Вторник* *Прохладно, как будто вот-вот пойдет дождь, но нет….* Приятно бывает встретиться лицом к лицу с сильным противником, потому что именно в такие моменты, после таких “битв”, становишься сильнее.

item.title: Analytic Protiv Khishnika
item.description: Аналитик против хищника *11.07.2018, Среда* *Ничего так, тепло.* Где-то в тёмном-тёмном лесу, среди высоких старых деревьев, притаившись в кустах выжидают свою жертву хищники.

item.title: Undesirable Mail
item.description: 19.07.2018, Thursday *Warm and cloudy.* “Open me! I am a payment order! I am important, I swear!

item.title: Rtfm Android
item.description: ADB On mobile enable developer’s mode and USB debugging. Trust the PC with adb when prompted on mobile.

item.title: How I Met Hugo
item.description: There was a time when I was desperately trying to become a web programmer (those wonderful days of naïve curiosity🤦‍♀️).

item.title: Memory Forensics
item.description: The approximate plan for this section is: Intro Physical drives: HDDs Flash memory RAM - Udemy SDF course How it works File Systems FAT Apple NTFS HFS+ Data recovery Cases Research itself: personal insights, techniques and strategies

item.title: Network Forensics
item.description: Plan for Network Forensics

item.title: Windows Forensics Plan
item.description: Plan for Windows Forensics Done (Udemy watched, tools installed and used, conclusions made) is bolded:
title: “Rtfm for Mobiles (iOS)” date: 2020-07-08T10:49:24+03:00 RTFM for mobiles #pentest #mobile #fieldmanual ADB adb devices adb shell su adb kill-server See logs:

item.title: About me
item.description: The quieter you become, the more you can hear… (c) The story I want to tell… … or how I entered the InfoSec field

item.title: Achievements
item.description: Penetration tester at SolidLab Ltd In May, 2019 I’ve taken a new career path to widen my knowledge and experience in information security as a penetration tester at SolidLab.
